name_en: Different colors spark unique brilliance, and different materials create depth and design. BOTTEGA VENETA Large HOP appears in the Retro Denim series. The structured denim pairs with soft leather. Fashion has no standard; innovation is progress. HOP and retro denim, a blend of classic and personal style, casual and lazy yet unique. The extra-large capacity is great for summer, freeing your hands in hot weather.
